title: Rainbow Lamps
body:
![Cover Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/UABQ0NTo/images/47fb0a82aec309778ed242925ebeaea48fbcb5b2.png) # Rainbow Lamps! A simple resource pack that makes redstone lamps animate their colours in a rainbow! Animates through the rainbow every 40 seconds.

--- *Note: If you use Sodium versions **before [0.5.4](https://github.com/CaffeineMC/sodium-fabric/releases/tag/mc1.20.2-0.5.4)**, you need to either update or turn off Performance -> Animate Only Visible Textures to keep the on and off textures in sync with each other. [It's a **recently fixed** Sodium bug.](https://github.com/CaffeineMC/sodium-fabric/issues/1479)* ![Animate Visible Textures: Off](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/UABQ0NTo/images/e68ae5c465ae4f9f8468863c8f3f1b1b5e367212.png)
